expectations: at most 3 TARGET_SOURCE_OR_CONFIG_READ and at most 1 BROAD_QUERY before any dispatch
control-plane and instruction reads do not consume the 3-read allowance
if the budget is insufficient, escalate to an investigator instead of broad inline reading
forbidden: more than 3 target source/config reads before dispatch
more than 1 broad query before dispatch
broad inline discovery justified by an expected-small fix
